## Summary

Briefly describe the resource or change.

## Resource Metadata

- Section:
- Resource type: OSS / HW / Dataset / Paper / Standard / Index / other
- Public source or provenance:
- Duplicate URL? yes / no

## Checklist

- [ ] The resource fits the repository scope.
- [ ] The link is public and working.
- [ ] The entry uses the standard format.
- [ ] The description is concise and neutral.
- [ ] Metadata tags use `data/tags.json`.
- [ ] The source and provenance are clear enough for a curated list.
